title: 2PCS 500ml /17Oz Plastic Clear Milk Carton - Square Milk Carton Water Bottle, Empty Reusable Milk Container, Portable Juice Bottles for Storing Homemade Beverages, Milk, Water
features: 🩵PACKAGE INCLUDES:You will get 2 x 500ml transparent milk cartons with white lids, 5.6cm wide at the bottom, 20.3cm bottle height, 1.9 and 4cm spout sizes, large capacity and lightweight, perfect for taking on the go.

🥛FOOD GRADE RAW MATERIALS: The transparent milk carton is made of PS material, which is Bisphenol A (BPA) free, odourless, sturdy, reusable, and transparent and shiny, with a unique and integrated appearance

🧃 BEAUTIFUL SHAPE: Our milk cups are square in design, unique and very creative, the bottle is transparent and the liquid inside the bottle is clearly visible. It is the first choice for beverage packaging, storage and daily use

🩵 EASY TO CLEAN, EASY TO USE: Our milk bottles are designed with two calibres, large calibre is easy to pour out, won't cause leakage and waste, and is convenient to clean; small calibre straight drinking mouth, fits the mouth shape to drink water more smoothly.

🥛VERSATILE USE: Threaded cap with a sealing ring keeps the milk carton tightly closed and prevents leakage, perfect for travelling, picnics, camping and other outdoor activities to carry juice, milk, water and anything else you want to drink.
description: Milk Carton Mug Specification Quantity 2 pcs Capacity: 17 oz (500ml) Bottom size: 2.2 inches (5.6 cm) Height: 8 inches (20.3 cm) Material: PP+PS Shape: Square Colour: transparent Characteristics: sealing leak-proof Warm tips. 1.Cups can not be directly loaded with 100 degrees of boiling water, Otherwise, it may be affected by the internal air pressure, resulting in the rupture of the cup. It is recommended to fill the cup with hot water below 60 degrees! 2.Due to the cup's rotary mouth is square, must be rotated to the position of the match in order to invert the water does not leak!
